Name: Absol
Effects: If the number of cards in your opponent's hand is at least 6, choose a number of cards there, without looking, until your opponent has 5 cards left. Have your opponent discard the cards you chose.
If you have more Prize cards left than your opponent, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

Name: Altaria
Effects: During your next turn, if any of your current Active Pokémon does damage to any Defending Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
Each Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Crawdaunt
Ability-Effect: As long as Crawdaunt is your Active Pokémon, when any of your Active Pokémon does damage to the Defending Pokémon, the attack does 10 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Flygon
Effects: Attach any number of basic Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.
Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each type of basic Energy card attached to Flygon.

Name: Grumpig
Effects: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.
If Grumpig and the Defending Pokémon have the same amount of Energy attached to them, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Name: Golem
Effects: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on all of your Active Pokémon.
Does 20 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon (1 if there is only 1). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Minun
Ability-Effect: As long as Minun is your Active Pokémon, whenever your other Active Pokémon, if any, attacks, you may use Cheer On after the first attack (you still need the necessary Energy to use Cheer On). You can't use Cheer On more than once in this way even if your other Active Pokémon has the Chain of Events Poké-Body.
Effects: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon (including Minun).

Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. If you choose Pokémon that has a Poké-Power or Poké-Body, this attack does 40 damage instead. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Plusle
Ability-Effect: As long as Plusle is your Active Pokémon, whenever your other Active Pokémon, if any, attacks, you may use Cheer On after the first attack (you still need the necessary Energy to use Cheer On). You can't use Cheer On more than once in this way even if your other Active Pokémon has the Chain of Events Poké-Body.
Effects: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon (including Plusle).

Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. If you choose Pokémon-ex, this attack does 40 damage instead. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon. )

Name: Roselia
Ability-Effect: Roselia can't be affected by any Special Conditions.
Effects: Attach up to 2 [G] Energy cards from your hand to your Pokémon in any way you like.
The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Salamence

Your opponent chooses the Defending Pokémon to switch. This power can't be used if Salamence is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Salamence during your opponent's next turn.

Ability-Effect: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Shedinja by your opponent's Evolved Pokémon and Pokémon-ex.
Effects: Put 1 damage counter, plus 1 more damage counter for each damage counter on Shedinja, on the Defending Pokémon.

The Defending Pokémon is now Burned. Flip a coin. If tails, discard a [R] Energy card attached to Torkoal.

Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Name: Girafarig

Name: Magneton
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have basic Energy cards in your discard pile, you may discard any 1 card from your hand. Then search for up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile, show them to your opponent, and put them into your hand. You can't return the card you first discarded to your hand in this way. This power can't be used if Magneton is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: Does 10 damage times the amount of Energy attached to all of your Pokémon (including Magneton).

Name: Ninjask
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, when you play Ninjask from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may search your deck for Shedinja and put it onto your Bench. Treat the new Benched Pokémon as a Basic Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.
Effects: You may switch Ninjask with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, you may move any number of [G] Energy cards attached to Ninjask to the new Active Pokémon.
